title: geum urbanum var. intermedium
intro: Geum urbanum var. intermedium, also known as Yellow Avens, is a plant species belonging to the Rosaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Geum urbanum var. intermedium include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. This plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile addition to herbal remedies.
